Since both Mediterranean options have the same rating and the package doesn't specify which exact restaurant, I'll use 'Lebanese Restaurant' as it's listed first in the Mediterranean category with a rating of 9.

All items in the final package have been successfully mapped to their corresponding ratings from the ground-truth data.
